name: Chase Sapphire Reserve® for Business

welcome_offer.description: 150,000 bonus points after spending $5,000 in first 3 months (estimated $2,250 toward travel via Chase Travel or transfer partners)

earning_rates.notes: 8x points on travel purchased through Chase Travel
5x points on all other travel purchases worldwide
3x points at restaurants worldwide including takeout and delivery

annual_credits.name: Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $300 annual credit on travel purchases (auto-applied, no enrollment)

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Unlimited Priority Pass Select lounge access for cardmember and guests

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 reimbursement for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS every 4 years

other_benefits.name: Transfer Partners
other_benefits.description: 1:1 point transfer to 14+ airline/hotel partners including United, Southwest, Hyatt, Marriott, British Airways

other_benefits.name: Primary Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver
Emergency Evacuation Coverage
other_benefits.description: Up to $100,000 for emergency medical evacuation

other_benefits.name: Trip Cancellation/Interruption
other_benefits.description: Up to $20,000 per person and $40,000 per trip

other_benefits.name: 24/7 Concierge
other_benefits.description: Access to travel and lifestyle concierge services

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards at No Cost
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional annual fee

other_benefits.name: FHR Benefits
other_benefits.description: Access to Chase's Luxury Hotel & Resort Collection (FHR) with breakfast, early check-in, upgrades, $100 experience credit

other_benefits.name: The Hotel Collection
other_benefits.description: THC: Complimentary room upgrade and $100 food/beverage credit at THC properties

fhr_thc.notes: Full FHR and THC access for business travelers. Can be combined with personal Sapphire Reserve for doubled lounge access and credits.

notes: Business version of Sapphire Reserve. Same $795 AF and credits. 150,000 point welcome bonus (higher than personal) makes it very attractive. Employee cards are free. Can combine points with personal Sapphire Reserve for larger balances. Key for business travelers who want same premium benefits as personal Reserve.

recurring_credits.name: $300 Annual Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300 annual credit for travel purchases. Automatically applied.

recurring_credits.name: $500 The Edit Credit
recurring_credits.description: $500 annual credit for prepaid hotels via The Edit by Chase Travel.

recurring_credits.name: $120 Lyft Credits
recurring_credits.description: $120 annual ($10/month) for Lyft rides. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: $200 Google Workspace Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200 annual credit for Google Workspace purchases.

recurring_credits.name: $100 Global Entry Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 every 4 years for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck.
